title: astragalus dasyphyllos
intro: Astragalus dasyphyllos, also known as milk vetch or white milk vetch, is a type of perennial legume plant native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus dasyphyllos include improving immune function, reducing fatigue and stress, and supporting cardiovascular health. Astragalus dasyphyllos can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
